race.comment: FASVARA (13) opened this prep with three wins from four starts then tried hard but found a couple better over this course and distance last start. Lightly raced three-year-old who is building a fine record. Just needs luck from the draw to be highly competitive again. TORNADO EXPRESS (16) made pleasing progress last time out at the third run of the prep, making late ground to get up for third over today's journey at Doomben. Won three of her previous four over 1200m. Cherry ripe and capable taking this out. SENESCHAL (11) strolled home over 1300m here when fresh from an eight-week break recently. Cannot be ruled out. HELLARIOUS (19) proved very game in defeat last start and should be in this for a long way.
